{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/16020669?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/impost0r", "id": 16020669, "login": "impost0r", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjE2MDIwNjY5", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/impost0r", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": null, "cvss": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 6.2, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:L/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-190", "name": "Integer Overflow or Wraparound"}], "description": "### Summary
Logic bug in `decode_simple_table_slow` may cause integer arithmetic overflow when decoding Modular image with certain kind of MA tree, which may panic with `overflow-checks` enabled.

### Impact
Denial of service: any application passing untrusted JXL data to `JxlImage::render_frame` (or equivalent) can be
crashed. Affects all builds with overflow checks enabled, which includes debug builds and any release build
that sets `overflow-checks = true` in Cargo.toml or `[profile.*]`.

No memory corruption is possible — the panic fires before any unsafe code is reached.", "ghsa_id": "GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-07-02T20:44:57Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-07-02T20:44:57Z", "references": ["https://github.com/tirr-c/jxl-oxide/security/advisories/GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/tirr-c/jxl-oxide/security-advisories/GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/tirr-c/jxl-oxide", "summary": "jxl-oxide: integer subtraction overflow panic in cluster_from_table via crafted JXL input (DoS)", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-07-02T20:44:58Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-2v8p-fqpx-2q3w", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "0.11.3", "package": {"ecosystem": "rust", "name": "jxl-modular"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 0.11.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: jxl-oxide: integer subtraction overflow panic in cluster_from_table via crafted JXL input (DoS)
